subject: [SO] Update the pods for cnf-adapter for the latest issues
commit_message:
[SO] Update the pods for cnf-adapter for the latest issues

Istanbul related pairwise testing issues resolved and updated the pods.

Issue-ID: SO-3404
Issue-ID: SO-3795

Signed-off-by: Lukasz Rajewski <lukasz.rajewski@orange.com>
Change-Id: Ieb133108231562efb24a06f605ece64f76ee1e7c
